commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=9e6dcd7fbec12788180e5b8bad1274a1a62e5558)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds governed managed TaskFlow terminalization, parent-summary delivery state, child-terminal suppression, fallback queuing, and regression tests in `src/tasks/task-registry.ts` and `src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts`.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding by source inspection: a governed Discord flow with `ownerKey=agent:main:discord:channel:123:thread:456` and `requesterOrigin.threadId` reaches the new branch and builds `to=channel:123:thread:456`. I did not run the PR tests in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer changes plus exact source-branch proof; automation should not take over while the required real behavior proof is missing.

target.title: fix(taskflow): finalize governed managed flows
target.body:
## Summary

- Finalize managed governed flow completion through the requester-owned parent lane.
- Fail closed with ParentFlowLinkError when task/flow linkage points at a different parent flow instead of advancing under a child-thread owner.
- Keep child-thread delivery as result notification only, with parent-channel closeout required before the next governed action.
- Suppress duplicate child-terminal delivery when the governed flow owns the parent closeout.

## Behavior

For managed flows with controllerId="governed-taskflow/v1":

- active child tasks prevent terminalization
- terminal child tasks are summarized into stateJson.terminalSummary
- stateJson.parentSummaryDelivery records queued/delivered/failed status with a deterministic context key
- requester delivery is attempted when a deliverable requester origin exists
- fallback queues a parent session event and wakes heartbeat
- mismatched parent flow/task linkage throws ParentFlowLinkError instead of silently continuing on the wrong flow
- stateJson.autoCloseOnAllChildrenTerminal=false or terminalCloseoutPolicy="manual" opt out of auto-close

## Validation

- corepack pnpm test src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts
  - 75 tests passed
- corepack pnpm check:test-types
- corepack pnpm exec oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/tasks/task-registry.ts src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts
- corepack pnpm exec oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/tasks/task-registry.ts src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts
- git diff --check origin/main...HEAD

## Scope Notes

- no sessions_spawn schema changes
- no ACP inherited-tool policy changes
- no retry/UI/docs expansion
- no local plugin/dist patch dependency
- regression fixtures are generic and avoid private instance identifiers, local paths, and deployment-specific names

AI-assisted: prepared with OpenAI Codex and parent-reviewed before publication.
target.author: dolencluka

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge

commands.author: DolencLuka
commands.command:
re-review

review blockers have been addressed in f27129b4d7b5:
- child-terminal suppression now only applies after a governed parent summary delivery state exists, so manual/auto-close opt-out flows keep normal child delivery
- delivery-runtime load failures now mark parent summary delivery failed and enqueue the parent-session fallback
- added focused regressions for both manual/auto-close opt-out child delivery and runtime-load fallback

local validation:
- corepack pnpm exec tsgo --noemit --pretty false --project tsconfig.json
- corepack pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts (75 passed)
- git diff --check

current ci note: all relevant pr/security/proof checks passed except checks-node-core-fast, which failed in unrelated src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.test.ts by 120s timeout; i do not have repo admin rights to rerun the failed job.

- child-terminal suppression now only applies after a governed parent summary delivery state exists, so manual/auto-close opt-out flows keep normal child delivery
- delivery-runtime load failures now mark parent summary delivery failed and enqueue the parent-session fallback

Local validation:
- corepack pnpm exec tsgo --noEmit --pretty false --project tsconfig.json
- corepack pnpm exec vitest run --config vitest.config.ts src/tasks/task-registry.test.ts (75 passed)
- git diff --check

Current CI note: all relevant PR/security/proof checks passed except checks-node-core-fast, which failed in unrelated src/infra/outbound/source-delivery-plan.test.ts by 120s timeout; I do not have repo admin rights to rerun the failed job.
